mastermind.name: Mastermind
mastermind.description: Set a secret color code or crack it before guesses run out.
mastermind.set_code_hint: Pick 4 colors — duplicates allowed. Your opponent won't see it.
mastermind.waiting_for_code: Waiting for {maker} to set their secret code…
mastermind.how_to_play:
One player sets a secret sequence of 4 colors (duplicates allowed). The other player has 10 guesses to crack it.
After each guess you get feedback: a black peg means the right color in the right spot; a white peg means the right color in the wrong spot.
Use the clues to narrow down the code. Crack it to win!
